script: echo '===== Users with displayName starting with Jesus ====='; az ad user list --filter "startswith(displayName,'Jesus')" 2>&1 | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(u.get('displayName'), '|', u.get('userPrincipalName'), '|', u.get('mail') or '-', '|', u.get('jobTitle') or '-', '|', u.get('id')) for u in d]" 2>&1 | head -20; echo; echo '===== Users with givenName starting with Jesus ====='; az ad user list --filter "startswith(givenName,'Jesus')" 2>&1 | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(u.get('displayName'), '|', u.get('userPrincipalName'), '|', u.get('mail') or '-', '|', u.get('jobTitle') or '-') for u in d]" 2>&1 | head -20
